register.headerInfo: Sign up to see photos and videos from your friends.

Send personal photos and messages to a f: Send photos and messages to a friend or group
stories2: Stories you archive will only be visible to you until you share them.

qr.title: People can quickly follow you by scanning your QR code
qr.description: People can scan your QR code with their camera to see your profile. Download and print your QR code, then stick it on products, posters, and more.

To help keep our community authentic, we: To help keep our community authentic, we're showing information about accounts on Instagram.

messages_description: Send photos and messages to a friend or group.
Chats will appear here after you send or: Chats will appear here after you send or receive a message
Your Instagram username and browser info: Your Instagram username and browser information will be automatically included in your message.
Please describe the problem in as much d: Please describe the problem in as much detail as possible...

account.Editing your links is only available on: Links can only be edited in the Instagram app. Tap Edit profile in the app.
account.This won’t be part of your public profil: This won’t be shown on your public profile.
account.Choose whether people can see similar ac: Choose if similar accounts can be suggested on your profile and if your account can be suggested on others.
account.Certain profile info, like your name, bi: Some profile info like name, bio, and links is visible to everyone.

Catch up on things you may have missed.
email_notification.Get updates on reports and violations of: Get updates on reports and Community Guidelines.

account_privacy.When your account is public, your profil: When your account is public, anyone can see your profile and posts — even without an Instagram account.
account_privacy.When your account is private, only the f: When private, only approved followers see your posts. Profile picture and username are still visible to everyone.

setting.We don't send notifications when you edi: No one is notified when you edit your Close Friends list.
setting.No one will be notified that you have ch: No one is notified when you change your Close Friends list.
setting.You can block people anytime from their: You can block anyone from their profile.
setting.Who sees when you're online?: Who can see when you're online
setting.You can always block people from their p: You can block anyone from their profile.

view_all_actions_taken: See actions taken on your account or content
you_are_not_at_risk_losing_access: Your account isn't at risk of being disabled right now
we_may_still_remove_account: We may still remove your account without warning if content violates Community Guidelines
how_satisfied_with_help: How satisfied were you with the help you received?
who_can_reply_to_your_story: Who can reply to your story
violations_description: Content that went against our rules.
creator: Creator
creator_description: For public figures, content creators, artists, influencers
business_description: For shops, local businesses, brands, organizations, service providers.
apps_and_websites_description: Apps and websites you've connected that have access to your Instagram data.
no_connected_apps: You haven't given any apps access to your Instagram account.
app_language_description: The language Instagram uses for buttons, titles, and text.
archive_description: Automatically save photos and videos to your archive so they don't take up phone storage. Only you can see it.
no_paid_subscriptions_description: You don't have any active subscriptions right now.
hide_likes_description_instagram: Like counts on posts and Reels from others will be hidden. You can hide counts on your own posts in advanced settings before sharing.
hide_likes_description_threads: Like, view, repost, and quote counts on others' posts will be hidden in Threads.
content_from_unfollowed_accounts: Content from accounts you don't follow
sensitive_content_description: Sensitive content doesn't violate Community Guidelines but may be unwanted by some.
choose_sensitive_content_amount: Choose how much sensitive content to see:
sensitive_content_scope: This applies to Explore, Reels, search results, hashtag pages, and comments on posts.
sensitive_content_standard_description: See a standard amount of sensitive content
restricted_accounts_description: Limit interactions from people without blocking or unfollowing them.
followers_and_following: Your followers and people you follow
allow_gif_comments_description: People can add GIFs in comments on your posts and Reels.
hide_comments_description: Offensive, misleading, or spammy comments go to a hidden section.
advanced_comment_filtering_description: Even comments that meet criteria may be hidden.
hide_message_requests_description: Potentially offensive or spammy requests go to Hidden requests.
custom_words_hide_comments_description: Comments with your custom words/phrases will be hidden.
custom_words_hide_requests_description: Message requests with your words will be filtered.
story_reshares_description: People can share your stories in messages.
embed_description: Public posts and profile can appear outside Instagram (articles, blogs, etc.).
who_can_tag_you_description: Choose who can tag you in photos/videos.
limited_interactions_enabled: Limited interactions are on — some people can't tag or mention you.
who_can_mention_you_description: Choose who can @mention you in stories, notes, comments, live, bio, captions.
allow_tags_from_following: Allow tags from people you follow
allow_mentions_from_following: Allow mentions from people you follow
hideLikeCount: Hide like count on this post
To grant access, click the lock icon in: Click the lock icon → Permissions → Allow Microphone → reload.
enable_microphone_instagram: Allow Instagram to use your microphone so others can hear you.
threads_share_info: Always share to Threads. Audience can be changed in Threads settings.
change_later_info: You can change this later from the top of your post.
likes_views_info: Only you can see like and view counts on this post. Change later via ··· menu.
hide_likes_views: Hide like and view counts on this post
accessibility_info: Alt text describes photos for people with visual impairments.
